macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indices Plunge Amid Geopolitical Tensions and Oil Surge
items.summary: S&P 500 down 65 points to 6677, Nasdaq down 265 to 24421, with potential for overnight limit down at 22,945; markets breaking to downside hitting lower Bollinger bands due to rising tensions.

items.title: Iran Gains as Energy Prices Soar, US Stocks Sink Sharply
items.summary: US stocks down 3.7% for the month and 1.6% weekly, busting through key averages; Dow and other indices hit lower Bollinger bands in oversold conditions amid energy crisis.

items.title: GIFT Nifty Trades 800 Points Lower as Brent Crude Hits $118
items.summary: Indian markets face sharp decline with Sensex and Nifty expected to open lower following global sell-offs; surge in crude oil prices driven by US-Iran war tensions.

items.title: Oil Surges 10-20% Overnight, Stocks and Metals Drop Sharply
items.summary: April oil approaches $100 print amid energy crisis; no financial panic in bonds yet, but portfolios likely down for the year with indices facing big problems.

items.title: Indonesian IHSG Plunges Over 5% to 7,100 on War Panic Selling
items.summary: Jakarta Composite Index opens in red, dropping more than 5% to 7,156 low; Rupiah weakens to Rp16,990 per USD amid global war-induced sell-off.

items.title: Global Energy Crisis Triggers Stock Plunge and 20% Oil Rally
items.summary: World stock markets plunge as oil prices surge 20% due to Iran-related conflicts; VIX and treasury volatility rise, signaling heightened cross-asset risks.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Faces Further Downside as Bottom Not Yet In, Amid High Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin experienced significant volatility with $333 million in liquidations, mostly longs, over the past 12 hours, and analysis indicates the market bottom is not yet reached based on higher timeframe technicals like Ichimoku cloud breakdowns.

items.title: US Crypto Policy Shifts to Innovation with SEC-CFTC Alignment and IPO Surge Expected
items.summary: Former CFTC Chair Chris Giancarlo highlights a policy reversal favoring crypto innovation, with SEC and CFTC now aligned, banks seeking clarity, and expectations for a bumper year of crypto trading platform IPOs after previous restrictions lifted.
items.source: The Wolf Of All Streets YouTube

items.title: Bitcoin Emerges as Beneficiary Amid AI Disruption, Credit Stress, and Oil Surge
items.summary: Financial market analysis points to Bitcoin as a potential winner from escalating AI buildout stresses, private credit risks at firms like Blackstone and BlackRock, and oil prices above $80 signaling inflation, amid broader market drawdown risks.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4, Reclaims Top Benchmark Position
items.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.4 has reclaimed the top spot on Artificial Analysis benchmarks while offering new cost-efficiency tradeoffs for practitioners, marking a significant advancement in large language model performance.

items.title: MIT Develops Explainable AI Technique for Computer Vision Models
items.summary: MIT researchers created a method that transforms computer vision models into explainable systems using human-understandable concepts, combining sparse autoencoders with multimodal LLMs to improve both accuracy and interpretability for high-stakes applications like medical diagnostics.

items.title: Shift Toward High-Efficiency Inference Models and Edge Computing
items.summary: The technology landscape is shifting toward high-efficiency inference models and specialized edge computing integrations that streamline generative AI deployment, enabling teams to scale solutions more effectively across diverse sectors.

items.title: Walmart Partners with Google on $1 Billion AI Upskilling Initiative
items.summary: Walmart has partnered with Google to upskill its 1.6 million employees through a $1 billion AI training program, recognizing AI skills as imperative for maintaining competitiveness.

items.title: Companies Shift Focus to Measuring Employee AI Competency
items.summary: Major American corporations are moving beyond AI adoption to assess how well employees understand and use AI, with platforms like Workera now serving about 10% of the Fortune 500 to evaluate AI fluency across basic terminology, generative AI, and responsible AI practices.

items.title: Hybrid AI-Classical Algorithms Approach Advances Robotics Deployment
items.summary: Canadian researchers demonstrated that combining reinforcement learning with classical algorithms significantly improves real-world robot performance, with MA Robot AI piloting this hybrid framework in hospital settings for autonomous lab sample delivery.

items.title: Siemens Healthineers Launches 'Cerebra' AI Innovation Initiative
items.summary: Ki Reply and Data Reply have established the strategic foundation for AI innovation at Siemens Healthineers through the 'Cerebra' initiative, advancing AI applications in healthcare.

items.title: EU Workshop Explores AI and Earth Observation Integration
items.summary: The European Commission is convening stakeholders to review challenges and opportunities in applying AI/ML to Copernicus Earth observation data, preparing for the next funding cycle (2028-2034) and exploring digital twin innovations.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Five New Steam Games Release in Past Week Including Shinehill and Angel Engine
items.summary: PC Gamer highlights recent Steam releases like Shinehill (March 7), Angel Engine (March 7), Planet of Lana 2 (March 6), iRacing Arcade (March 4), and Homura Hime (February 25), spotlighting indie titles you might have missed.

items.title: RoboCop: Rogue City Update Accidentally Reveals Unannounced Hunter: The Reckoning Sequel
items.summary: A Steam update for RoboCop: Rogue City briefly replaced it with an incomplete, unannounced sequel to Hunter: The Reckoning, sparking surprise among players.

items.title: Microsoft CEO Nadella Pledges Continuous Heavy Investment in Gaming
items.summary: During a Q&A, Satya Nadella affirmed Microsoft will 'always' invest in gaming and aims for its teams to become the best in the industry.

items.title: March 2026 Hailed as First Major 'Event Month' for Games in Years
items.summary: Upcoming releases like Crimson Desert, Death Stranding 2, Pokémon, and Legacy of Kain are making March 2026 feel like a packed, old-school event month for gaming.

items.title: Chill with You: Lo-Fi Story Newly Released on Steam
items.summary: Nestopi Inc. has launched Chill with You: Lo-Fi Story on Steam, featured in recent game news roundup on March 9.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Marvell Technology Reports Strong Q4 Data-Center Revenue Growth and 1.6T Solutions Bookings
items.summary: Marvell Technology announced Q4 data-center revenue of $1.5B with 40% growth, strong bookings for cutting-edge 1.6T optical interconnects entering production, and expects custom revenue to grow over 20% in fiscal 2027. Management dismissed concerns over losing major customers like Amazon and Microsoft.[2]

items.title: India Reviews Progress on First Integrated Ocean Thermal Energy Conversion Plant in Lakshadweep
items.summary: Union Minister Jitendra Singh reviewed India's first Integrated Ocean Thermal Energy Conversion (OTEC) plant in Kavaratti, Lakshadweep, marking a key development in renewable ocean energy technology. The plant is being developed under the Ministry of Science and Technology.[1]

items.title: India Notifies Standards for Green Ammonia and Green Methanol under National Green Hydrogen Mission
items.summary: The Government of India notified standards for green ammonia and green methanol as part of the National Green Hydrogen Mission, advancing clean energy production technologies. This supports broader green hydrogen initiatives.[1]

items.title: BEL and SASMOS Sign MoU to Boost Indigenous Defence Manufacturing and Exports
items.summary: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) and SASMOS signed a Memorandum of Understanding to enhance indigenous defence electronics manufacturing, including rapid development of defence-grade systems. The partnership aims to strengthen exports.[1]
